title: The Shattered Order (Stick ranger mod)
description: An RPG mod that aims to recreate the game "Stick rangers" in minecraft by adding custom procedural structures, blocks, items, armors, with some extra.
body:
# The shattered order
## This mod requires Geckolib and Curios api to work!
Comment and give me a feedback!

## Classes

This mod currently adds 16 rpg classes being:

Boxer, Gladiator, Sniper, Magician,

Priest, Gunner, Whipper, Angel,

Miner, Lumberjack, Hammerer, Spearman,

Predator, Reaper, Wizard, Cutter

## Bestiary

An integrated way to see mobs stats and drops

#New Gloomwood arena

Clear waves of monsters to face new elite bosses with new attacks 



no spoiler on this one



## Current Content:

-12 fully animated entities and 3 bosses with custom animations and attacks to fight (4 mobs and 1 boss are currently  creative only) 2 elite bosses can be fought in the Gloomwood arena

-48 weapons, three for each class

-49 new blocks

-11 new armor sets with buffs when fully equipped

-88 new items for crafting

-29 curios items to boost your stats

-16 new enchant to power up your weapons

-16 new cosmetics (BETA)

-2 new complitely procedural structures with loot and dangers

Go see images to see structure, armors, items and mobs



## Important

This mod is inspired by a game called "Stick Rangers" and adds a lot of stuff from the game as well as new items


[-->Curse Forge Link<--](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-shattered-order)

[-->Modrinth Link<--]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-shattered-order](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-shattered-order))



Modpacks

You are completely free to use this mod in modpacks
